Name: APlayerController
Description:
PlayerControllers are used by human players to control Pawns.
 
  ControlRotation (accessed via GetControlRotation()), determines the aiming
  orientation of the controlled Pawn.
 
  In networked games, PlayerControllers exist on the server for every player-controlled pawn,
  and also on the controlling client's machine. They do NOT exist on a client's
  machine for pawns controlled by remote players elsewhere on the network.

Variables.Name: Player
Variables.Description: UPlayer associated with this PlayerController.  Could be a local player or a net connection.

Variables.Name: AcknowledgedPawn
Variables.Description: Used in net games so client can acknowledge it possessed a specific pawn.

Variables.Name: ControllingDirTrackInst
Variables.Description: Director track that's currently possessing this player controller, or none if not possessed.

Variables.Name: MyHUD
Variables.Description: Heads up display associated with this PlayerController.

Variables.Name: PlayerCameraManager
Variables.Description: Camera manager associated with this Player Controller.

Variables.Name: PlayerCameraManagerClass
Variables.Description: PlayerCamera class should be set for each game, otherwise Engine.PlayerCameraManager is used

Variables.Name: bAutoManageActiveCameraTarget
Variables.Description:
True to allow this player controller to manage the camera target for you,
	  typically by using the possessed pawn as the camera target. Set to false
	  if you want to manually control the camera target.

Variables.Name: SmoothTargetViewRotationSpeed
Variables.Description: Interp speed for blending remote view rotation for smoother client updates

Variables.Name: HiddenActors
Variables.Description: The actors which the camera shouldn't see - e.g. used to hide actors which the camera penetrates

Variables.Name: HiddenPrimitiveComponents
Variables.Description: Explicit components the camera shouldn't see (helpful for external systems to hide a component from a single player)

Variables.Name: LastSpectatorStateSynchTime
Variables.Description: Used to make sure the client is kept synchronized when in a spectator state

Variables.Name: LastSpectatorSyncLocation
Variables.Description: Last location synced on the server for a spectator.

Variables.Name: LastSpectatorSyncRotation
Variables.Description: Last rotation synced on the server for a spectator.

Variables.Name: ClientCap
Variables.Description: Cap set by server on bandwidth from client to server in bytessec (only has impact if >=2600)

Variables.Name: CheatManager
Variables.Description: Object that manages "cheat" commands.  Not instantiated in shipping builds.

Variables.Name: CheatClass
Variables.Description: Class of my CheatManager.  The Cheat Manager is not created in shipping builds

Variables.Name: CheatManagerExtras
Variables.Description: Object that manages "cheat" commands.  Not instantiated in shipping builds.

Variables.Name: CheatClassExtras
Variables.Description: Class of my CheatManager.  The Cheat Manager is not created in shipping builds

Variables.Name: PlayerInput
Variables.Description: Object that manages player input.

Variables.Name: bPlayerIsWaiting
Variables.Description: True if PlayerController is currently waiting for the match to start or to respawn. Only valid in Spectating state.

Variables.Name: NetPlayerIndex
Variables.Description:
index identifying players using the same base connection (splitscreen clients)
	  Used by netcode to match replicated PlayerControllers to the correct splitscreen viewport and child connection
	  replicated via special internal code, not through normal variable replication

Variables.Name: PendingSwapConnection
Variables.Description:
this is set on the OLD PlayerController when performing a swap over a network connection
	  so we know what connection we're waiting on acknowledgment from to finish destroying this PC
	  (or when the connection is closed)
	  @see GameModeBase::SwapPlayerControllers()

Variables.Name: NetConnection
Variables.Description: The net connection this controller is communicating on, NULL for local players on server

Variables.Name: InputYawScale
Variables.Description: Yaw input speed scaling

Variables.Name: InputPitchScale
Variables.Description: Pitch input speed scaling

Variables.Name: InputRollScale
Variables.Description: Roll input speed scaling

Variables.Name: bShowMouseCursor
Variables.Description: Whether the mouse cursor should be displayed.

Variables.Name: bEnableClickEvents
Variables.Description: Whether actorcomponent click events should be generated.

Variables.Name: bEnableTouchEvents
Variables.Description: Whether actorcomponent touch events should be generated.

Variables.Name: bEnableMouseOverEvents
Variables.Description: Whether actorcomponent mouse over events should be generated.

Variables.Name: bEnableTouchOverEvents
Variables.Description: Whether actorcomponent touch over events should be generated.

Variables.Name: ForceFeedbackScale
Variables.Description: Scale applied to force feedback values

Variables.Name: DefaultClickTraceChannel
Variables.Description: Default trace channel used for determining what world object was clicked on.

Variables.Name: CurrentClickTraceChannel
Variables.Description: Trace channel currently being used for determining what world object was clicked on.

Variables.Name: bActiveReplayViewer
Variables.Description: true means this controller is active now as a replay viewer

Variables.Name: bEnableReplayRecord
Variables.Description: true means this controller is enable to record for replay

Variables.Name: InactiveStateInputComponent
Variables.Description: InputComponent we use when player is in Inactive state.

Variables.Name: bShouldPerformFullTickWhenPaused
Variables.Description: Whether we fully tick when the game is paused, if our tick function is allowed to do so. If false, we do a minimal update during the tick.

Variables.Name: CurrentTouchInterface
Variables.Description: The currently set touch interface

Variables.Name: SpectatorPawn
Variables.Description: The pawn used when spectating (NULL if not spectating).

Variables.Name: SpawnLocation
Variables.Description: The location used internally when there is no pawn or spectator, to know where to spawn the spectator or focus the camera on death.

Variables.Name: bIsLocalPlayerController
Variables.Description: Set during SpawnActor once and never again to indicate the intent of this controller instance (SERVER ONLY)

Variables.Name: SeamlessTravelCount
Variables.Description: Counter for this players seamless travels (used along with the below value, to restrict ServerNotifyLoadedWorld)

Variables.Name: LastCompletedSeamlessTravelCount
Variables.Description: The value of SeamlessTravelCount, upon the last call to GameModeBase::HandleSeamlessTravelPlayer; used to detect seamless travel

Variables.Name: bNeedResetCameraOnPossess
Variables.Description: Restart Player by plane do not reset camera!  Engine Modification by czcheng, 2021.6.8

Functions.Name: ServerSetSpectatorWaiting
Functions.Description: Indicate that the Spectator is waiting to joinrespawn.

Functions.Name: ClientSetSpectatorWaiting
Functions.Description: Indicate that the Spectator is waiting to joinrespawn.

Functions.Name: EnableCheats
Functions.Description: Enables cheats within the game

Functions.Name: FOV
Functions.Description: Set the field of view to NewFOV

Functions.Name: RestartLevel
Functions.Description: Restarts the current level

Functions.Name: LocalTravel
Functions.Description: Causes the client to travel to the given URL

Functions.Name: ClientReturnToMainMenu
Functions.Description: Return the client to the main menu gracefully

Functions.Name: ClientRepObjRef
Functions.Description: Development RPC for testing object reference replication

Functions.Name: Pause
Functions.Description: Command to try to pause the game.

Functions.Name: SetName
Functions.Description: Trys to set the player's name to the given name.

Functions.Name: SwitchLevel

Functions.Name: DeprojectMousePositionToWorld
Functions.Description: Convert current mouse 2D position to World Space 3D position and direction. Returns false if unable to determine value.

Functions.Name: DeprojectScreenPositionToWorld
Functions.Description: Convert 2D screen position to World Space 3D position and direction. Returns false if unable to determine value.

Functions.Name: ProjectWorldLocationToScreen
Functions.Description: Convert a World Space 3D position into a 2D Screen Space position.

Return.Description: true if the world coordinate was successfully projected to the screen.

Functions.Name: SetMouseLocation
Functions.Description: Positions the mouse cursor in screen space, in pixels.

Functions.Name: StartFire
Functions.Description: Fire the player's currently selected weapon with the optional fire mode.

Functions.Name: ClientEnableNetworkVoice
Functions.Description: Tell the client to enable or disable voice chat (not muting)

Params.Name: bEnable
Params.Description: enable or disable voice chat

Functions.Name: ToggleSpeaking
Functions.Description: Toggle voice chat on and off

Functions.Name: ClientVoiceHandshakeComplete
Functions.Description:
Tells the client that the server has all the information it needs and that it
	  is ok to start sending voice packets. The server will already send voice packets
	  when this function is called, since it is set server side and then forwarded
	 
	  NOTE: This is done as an RPC instead of variable replication because ordering matters

Functions.Name: ServerMutePlayer
Functions.Description: Tell the server to mute a player for this controller

Params.Name: PlayerId
Params.Description: player id to mute

Functions.Name: ServerUnmutePlayer
Functions.Description: Tell the server to unmute a player for this controller

Params.Name: PlayerId
Params.Description: player id to unmute

Functions.Name: ClientMutePlayer
Functions.Description: Tell the client to mute a player for this controller

Params.Name: PlayerId
Params.Description: player id to mute

Functions.Name: ClientUnmutePlayer
Functions.Description: Tell the client to unmute a player for this controller

Params.Name: PlayerId
Params.Description: player id to unmute

Functions.Name: ConsoleKey
Functions.Description: Console control commands, useful when remote debugging so you can't touch the console the normal way

Functions.Name: SendToConsole

Functions.Description: Adds a location to the texture streaming system for the specified duration.

Functions.Name: ClientCancelPendingMapChange
Functions.Description: Tells client to cancel any pending map change.

Functions.Name: ClientCapBandwidth
Functions.Description: Set CurrentNetSpeed to the lower of its current value and Cap.

Functions.Name: ClientCommitMapChange
Functions.Description: Actually performs the level transition prepared by PrepareMapChange().

Functions.Name: ClientFlushLevelStreaming
Functions.Description:
Tells the client to block until all pending level streaming actions are complete
	  happens at the end of the tick
	  primarily used to force update the client ASAP at join time

Functions.Name: ClientForceGarbageCollection
Functions.Description: Forces GC at the end of the tick on the client

Functions.Name: ClientGameEnded
Functions.Description: Replicated function called by GameHasEnded().

Params.Name: EndGameFocus
Params.Description: - actor to view with camera

Params.Name: bIsWinner
Params.Description: - true if this controller is on winning team

Functions.Name: ClientGotoState
Functions.Description: Server uses this to force client into NewState .

Functions.Name: ClientIgnoreLookInput
Functions.Description: calls IgnoreLookInput on client

Functions.Name: ClientIgnoreMoveInput
Functions.Description: calls IgnoreMoveInput on client

Functions.Description: Outputs a message to HUD

Params.Name: S
Params.Description: - message to display

Params.Name: Type
Params.Description: - @todo document

Params.Name: MsgLifeTime
Params.Description: - Optional length of time to display 0 = default time

Functions.Name: ClientPlayCameraAnim
Functions.Description: Play the indicated CameraAnim on this camera.

Params.Name: AnimToPlay
Params.Description: - Camera animation to play

Params.Name: Scale
Params.Description: - "Intensity" scalar. This is the scale at which the anim was first played.

Params.Name: Rate
Params.Description: - Multiplier for playback rate. 1.0 = normal.

Params.Name: BlendInTime
Params.Description: - Time to interpolate in from zero, for smooth starts

Params.Name: BlendOutTime
Params.Description: - Time to interpolate out to zero, for smooth finishes

Params.Name: bLoop
Params.Description: - True if the animation should loop, false otherwise

Params.Name: bRandomStartTime
Params.Description: - Whether or not to choose a random time to start playing. Only really makes sense for bLoop = true

Params.Name: Space
Params.Description: - Animation play area

Params.Name: CustomPlaySpace
Params.Description: - Matrix used when Space = CAPS_UserDefined

Functions.Name: ClientPlayCameraShake
Functions.Description: Play Camera Shake

Params.Name: Shake
Params.Description: - Camera shake animation to play

Params.Name: Scale
Params.Description: - Scalar defining how "intense" to play the anim

Params.Name: PlaySpace
Params.Description: - Which coordinate system to play the shake in (used for CameraAnims within the shake).

Params.Name: UserPlaySpaceRot
Params.Description: - Matrix used when PlaySpace = CAPS_UserDefined

Functions.Name: ClientPlaySound
Functions.Description: Play sound client-side (so only the client will hear it)

Params.Name: Sound
Params.Description: - Sound to play

Params.Name: VolumeMultiplier
Params.Description: - Volume multiplier to apply to the sound

Params.Name: PitchMultiplier
Params.Description: - Pitch multiplier to apply to the sound

Functions.Description: Play sound client-side at the specified location

Params.Name: Sound
Params.Description: - Sound to play

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: - Location to play the sound at

Params.Name: VolumeMultiplier
Params.Description: - Volume multiplier to apply to the sound

Params.Name: PitchMultiplier
Params.Description: - Pitch multiplier to apply to the sound

Functions.Name: ClientPrepareMapChange
Functions.Description:
Asynchronously loads the given level in preparation for a streaming map transition.
	  the server sends one function per level name since dynamic arrays can't be replicated

Params.Name: bFirst
Params.Description: - whether this is the first item in the list (so clear the list first)

Params.Name: bLast
Params.Description: - whether this is the last item in the list (so start preparing the change after receiving it)

Functions.Name: ClientPrestreamTextures
Functions.Description:
Forces the streaming system to disregard the normal logic for the specified duration and
	  instead always load all mip-levels for all textures used by the specified actor.

Params.Name: ForcedActor
Params.Description: - The actor whose textures should be forced into memory.

Params.Name: ForceDuration
Params.Description: - Number of seconds to keep all mip-levels in memory, disregarding the normal priority logic.

Params.Name: bEnableStreaming
Params.Description: - Whether to start (true) or stop (false) streaming

Params.Name: CinematicTextureGroups
Params.Description: - Bitfield indicating which texture groups that use extra high-resolution mips

Functions.Name: ClientReset
Functions.Description: Tell client to reset the PlayerController

Functions.Name: ClientRestart
Functions.Description: Tell client to restart the level

Functions.Name: ClientSetBlockOnAsyncLoading
Functions.Description:
Tells the client to block until all pending level streaming actions are complete.
	  Happens at the end of the tick primarily used to force update the client ASAP at join time.

Functions.Name: ClientSetCameraFade
Functions.Description: Tell client to fade camera

Functions.Name: ClientSetCameraMode
Functions.Description: Replicated function to set camera style on client

Functions.Name: ClientSetCinematicMode
Functions.Description: Called by the server to synchronize cinematic transitions with the client

Functions.Name: ClientSetForceMipLevelsToBeResident
Functions.Description:
Forces the streaming system to disregard the normal logic for the specified duration and
	  instead always load all mip-levels for all textures used by the specified material.

Params.Name: Material
Params.Description: - The material whose textures should be forced into memory.

Params.Name: ForceDuration
Params.Description: - Number of seconds to keep all mip-levels in memory, disregarding the normal priority logic.

Params.Name: CinematicTextureGroups
Params.Description: - Bitfield indicating which texture groups that use extra high-resolution mips

Functions.Name: ClientSetHUD
Functions.Description: Set the client's class of HUD and spawns a new instance of it. If there was already a HUD active, it is destroyed.

Functions.Name: GetViewportSize
Functions.Description: Helper to get the size of the HUD canvas for this player controller.  Returns 0 if there is no HUD

Functions.Name: GetHUD
Functions.Description: Gets the HUD currently being used by this player controller

Functions.Name: SetMouseCursorWidget
Functions.Description: Sets the Widget for the Mouse Cursor to display

Params.Name: Cursor
Params.Description: - the cursor to set the widget for

Params.Name: CursorWidget

Functions.Name: ClientSetViewTarget
Functions.Description: Set the view target

Params.Name: A
Params.Description: - new actor to set as view target

Params.Name: TransitionParams
Params.Description: - parameters to use for controlling the transition

Functions.Name: ClientSpawnCameraLensEffect
Functions.Description: Spawn a camera lens effect (e.g. blood).

Functions.Name: ClientClearCameraLensEffects
Functions.Description: Removes all Camera Lens Effects.

Functions.Name: ClientStopCameraAnim
Functions.Description: Stop camera animation on client.

Functions.Name: ClientStopCameraShake
Functions.Description: Stop camera shake on client.

Functions.Name: ClientPlayForceFeedback
Functions.Description: Play a force feedback pattern on the player's controller

Params.Name: ForceFeedbackEffect
Params.Description: The force feedback pattern to play

Params.Name: bLooping
Params.Description: Whether the pattern should be played repeatedly or be a single one shot

Params.Name: bIgnoreTimeDilation
Params.Description: Whether the pattern should ignore time dilation

Params.Name: Tag
Params.Description: A tag that allows stopping of an effect. If another effect with this Tag is playing, it will be stopped and replaced

Functions.Name: ClientStopForceFeedback
Functions.Description: Stops a playing force feedback pattern

Params.Name: ForceFeedbackEffect
Params.Description: If set only patterns from that effect will be stopped

Params.Name: Tag
Params.Description: If not none only the pattern with this tag will be stopped

Functions.Name: PlayDynamicForceFeedback
Functions.Description:
Latent action that controls the playing of force feedback
	  Begins playing when Start is called.  Calling Update or Stop if the feedback is not active will have no effect.
	  Completed will execute when Stop is called or the duration ends.
	  When Update is called the Intensity, Duration, and affect values will be updated with the current inputs

Params.Name: Intensity
Params.Description: How strong the feedback should be. Valid values are between 0.0 and 1.0

Params.Name: Duration
Params.Description: How long the feedback should play for. If the value is negative it will play until stopped

Functions.Name: PlayHapticEffect
Functions.Description: Play a haptic feedback curve on the player's controller

Params.Name: HapticEffect
Params.Description: The haptic effect to play

Params.Name: Hand
Params.Description: Which hand to play the effect on

Params.Name: Scale
Params.Description: Scale between 0.0 and 1.0 on the intensity of playback

Functions.Name: StopHapticEffect
Functions.Description: Stops a playing haptic feedback curve

Params.Name: Hand
Params.Description: Which hand to stop the effect for

Functions.Name: SetHapticsByValue
Functions.Description:
Sets the value of the haptics for the specified hand directly, using frequency and amplitude.  NOTE:  If a curve is already
	 playing for this hand, it will be cancelled in favour of the specified values.

Params.Name: Frequency
Params.Description: The normalized frequency [0.0, 1.0] to play through the haptics system

Params.Name: Amplitude
Params.Description: The normalized amplitude [0.0, 1.0] to set the haptic feedback to

Params.Name: Hand
Params.Description: Which hand to play the effect on

Functions.Name: SetControllerLightColor
Functions.Description: Sets the light color of the player's controller

Params.Name: Color
Params.Description: The color for the light to be

Functions.Name: ClientTravel
Functions.Description:
Travel to a different map or IP address. Calls the PreClientTravel event before doing anything.
	  NOTE: This is implemented as a locally executed wrapper for ClientTravelInternal, to avoid API compatability breakage

Params.Name: URL
Params.Description: A string containing the mapname (or IP address) to travel to, along with option keyvalue pairs

Params.Name: TravelType
Params.Description: specifies whether the client should append URL options used in previous travels; if true is specified

Params.Name: bSeamless
Params.Description: Indicates whether to use seamless travel (requires TravelType of TRAVEL_Relative)

Params.Name: MapPackageGuid
Params.Description: The GUID of the map package to travel to - this is used to find the file when it has been autodownloaded,

Functions.Name: ClientTravelInternal
Functions.Description: Internal clientside implementation of ClientTravel - use ClientTravel to call this

Params.Name: URL
Params.Description: A string containing the mapname (or IP address) to travel to, along with option keyvalue pairs

Params.Name: TravelType
Params.Description: specifies whether the client should append URL options used in previous travels; if true is specified

Params.Name: bSeamless
Params.Description: Indicates whether to use seamless travel (requires TravelType of TRAVEL_Relative)

Params.Name: MapPackageGuid
Params.Description: The GUID of the map package to travel to - this is used to find the file when it has been autodownloaded,

Functions.Name: ClientUpdateLevelStreamingStatus
Functions.Description: Replicated Update streaming status

Params.Name: PackageName
Params.Description: - Name of the level package name used for loading.

Params.Name: bNewShouldBeLoaded
Params.Description: - Whether the level should be loaded

Params.Name: bNewShouldBeVisible
Params.Description: - Whether the level should be visible if it is loaded

Params.Name: bNewShouldBlockOnLoad
Params.Description: - Whether we want to force a blocking load

Params.Name: LODIndex
Params.Description: - Current LOD index for a streaming level

Functions.Name: ClientWasKicked
Functions.Description: Notify client they were kicked from the server

Functions.Name: ClientStartOnlineSession
Functions.Description: Notify client that the session is starting

Functions.Name: ClientEndOnlineSession
Functions.Description: Notify client that the session is about to start

Functions.Name: ClientRetryClientRestart
Functions.Description: Assign Pawn to player, but avoid calling ClientRestart if we have already accepted this pawn

Functions.Name: ClientReceiveLocalizedMessage
Functions.Description: send client localized message id

Functions.Name: ServerAcknowledgePossession
Functions.Description: acknowledge possession of pawn

Functions.Name: ServerCamera
Functions.Description: change mode of camera

Functions.Name: ServerChangeName
Functions.Description: Change name of server

Functions.Name: ServerNotifyLoadedWorld
Functions.Description: Called to notify the server when the client has loaded a new world via seamless traveling

Params.Name: WorldPackageName
Params.Description: the name of the world package that was loaded

Functions.Name: ServerPause
Functions.Description: Replicate pause request to the server

Functions.Name: ServerRestartPlayer
Functions.Description: Attempts to restart this player, generally called from the client upon respawn request.

Functions.Name: ServerSetSpectatorLocation
Functions.Description: When spectating, updates spectator locationrotation and pings the server to make sure spectating should continue.

Functions.Name: ServerCheckClientPossession
Functions.Description: Tells the server to make sure the possessed pawn is in sync with the client.

Functions.Name: ServerCheckClientPossessionReliable
Functions.Description: Reliable version of ServerCheckClientPossession to be used when there is no likely danger of spamming the network.

Functions.Name: ServerShortTimeout
Functions.Description: Notifies the server that the client has ticked gameplay code, and should no longer get the extended "still loading" timeout grace period

Functions.Name: ServerUpdateCamera
Functions.Description: If PlayerCamera.bUseClientSideCameraUpdates is set, client will replicate camera positions to the server.

Functions.Name: ServerUpdateLevelVisibility
Functions.Description:
Called when the client addsremoves a streamed level
	  the server will only replicate references to Actors in visible levels so that it's impossible to send references to
	  Actors the client has not initialized

Params.Name: PackageName
Params.Description: the name of the package for the level whose status changed

Functions.Name: ServerVerifyViewTarget
Functions.Description: Used by client to request server to confirm current viewtarget (server will respond with ClientSetViewTarget() ).

Functions.Name: ServerViewNextPlayer
Functions.Description: Move camera to next player on round ended or spectating

Functions.Name: ServerViewPrevPlayer
Functions.Description: Move camera to previous player on round ended or spectating

Functions.Name: ServerViewSelf
Functions.Description: Move camera to current user

Functions.Name: ServerToggleAILogging
Functions.Description: Used by UGameplayDebuggingControllerComponent to replicate messages for AI debugging in network games.

Functions.Name: AddPitchInput
Functions.Description: Add Pitch (look up) input. This value is multiplied by InputPitchScale.

Params.Name: Val
Params.Description: Amount to add to Pitch. This value is multiplied by InputPitchScale.

Functions.Name: AddYawInput
Functions.Description: Add Yaw (turn) input. This value is multiplied by InputYawScale.

Params.Name: Val
Params.Description: Amount to add to Yaw. This value is multiplied by InputYawScale.

Functions.Name: AddRollInput
Functions.Description: Add Roll input. This value is multiplied by InputRollScale.

Params.Name: Val
Params.Description: Amount to add to Roll. This value is multiplied by InputRollScale.

Functions.Name: IsInputKeyDown
Functions.Description: Returns true if the given keybutton is pressed on the input of the controller (if present)

Functions.Name: WasInputKeyJustPressed
Functions.Description: Returns true if the given keybutton was up last frame and down this frame.

Functions.Name: WasInputKeyJustReleased
Functions.Description: Returns true if the given keybutton was down last frame and up this frame.

Functions.Name: GetInputAnalogKeyState
Functions.Description: Returns the analog value for the given keybutton.  If analog isn't supported, returns 1 for down and 0 for up.

Functions.Name: GetInputVectorKeyState
Functions.Description: Returns the vector value for the given keybutton.

Functions.Name: GetInputTouchState
Functions.Description: Retrieves the X and Y screen coordinates of the specified touch key. Returns false if the touch index is not down

Functions.Name: GetInputMotionState
Functions.Description: Retrieves the current motion state of the player's input device

Functions.Name: GetMousePosition
Functions.Description: Retrieves the X and Y screen coordinates of the mouse cursor. Returns false if there is no associated mouse device

Functions.Name: GetInputKeyTimeDown
Functions.Description: Returns how long the given keybutton has been down.  Returns 0 if it's up or it just went down this frame.

Functions.Name: GetInputMouseDelta
Functions.Description: Retrieves how far the mouse moved this frame.

Functions.Name: GetInputAnalogStickState
Functions.Description: Retrieves the X and Y displacement of the given analog stick.

Functions.Name: ActivateTouchInterface
Functions.Description: Activates a new touch interface for this player controller

Functions.Name: SetVirtualJoystickVisibility
Functions.Description: Set the virtual joystick visibility.

Functions.Name: FadeInVirtualJoystick
Functions.Description: Fade in the virtual joystick.

Functions.Name: FadeOutVirtualJoystick
Functions.Description: Fade out the virtual joystick.

Functions.Name: InitVirtualJoystickBySetting
Functions.Description: Set the virtual joystick visibility.

Functions.Name: GetViewportCacheGeometryScale
Functions.Description: 获取Viewport的缓存几何缩放

Functions.Name: Camera
Functions.Description: Change Camera mode

Functions.Name: SetViewTargetWithBlend
Functions.Description: Set the view target blending with variable control

Params.Name: NewViewTarget
Params.Description: - new actor to set as view target

Params.Name: BlendTime
Params.Description: - time taken to blend

Params.Name: BlendFunc
Params.Description: - Cubic, Linear etc functions for blending

Params.Name: BlendExp
Params.Description: - Exponent, used by certain blend functions to control the shape of the curve.

Params.Name: bLockOutgoing
Params.Description: - If true, lock outgoing viewtarget to last frame's camera position for the remainder of the blend.

Functions.Name: SetAudioListenerOverride
Functions.Description: Used to override the default positioning of the audio listener

Params.Name: AttachToComponent
Params.Description: Optional component to attach the audio listener to

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: Depending on whether Component is attached this is either an offset from its location or an absolute position

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: Depending on whether Component is attached this is either an offset from its rotation or an absolute rotation

Functions.Name: ClearAudioListenerOverride
Functions.Description: Clear any overrides that have been applied to audio listener

Functions.Name: SetCinematicMode
Functions.Description:
ServerSP only function for changing whether the player is in cinematic mode.  Updates values of various state variables, then replicates the call to the client
	  to sync the current cinematic mode.

Params.Name: bInCinematicMode
Params.Description: specify true if the player is entering cinematic mode; false if the player is leaving cinematic mode.

Params.Name: bHidePlayer
Params.Description: specify true to hide the player's pawn (only relevant if bInCinematicMode is true)

Params.Name: bAffectsHUD
Params.Description: specify true if we should showhide the HUD to match the value of bCinematicMode

Params.Name: bAffectsMovement
Params.Description: specify true to disable movement in cinematic mode, enable it when leaving

Params.Name: bAffectsTurning
Params.Description: specify true to disable turning in cinematic mode or enable it when leaving

Functions.Name: OnServerStartedVisualLogger
Functions.Description: Notify from server that Visual Logger is recording, to show that information on client about possible performance issues

Functions.Name: GetSpectatorPawn
Functions.Description: Get the Pawn used when spectating. NULL when not spectating.

Functions.Name: GetFocalLocation
Functions.Description:
Returns the location the PlayerController is focused on.
	   If there is a possessed Pawn, returns the Pawn's location.
	   If there is a spectator Pawn, returns that Pawn's location.
	   Otherwise, returns the PlayerController's spawn location (usually the last known Pawn location after it has died).

Functions.Name: StartTouchEventRecord
Functions.Description: 开始记录Touch事件，将信息保存在TouchEventRecordData中，给定一个文件名存盘

Params.Name: RecordFileName
Params.Description: 记录保存到的文件名

Functions.Name: StopTouchEventRecord
Functions.Description: 停止记录Touch事件，将TouchEventRecordData中的数据保存到文件

Functions.Name: ReplayTouchEventRecord
Functions.Description: 从文件中加载Touch事件，并进行重放

Params.Name: RecordFileName
Params.Description: 记录文件名

Functions.Name: GetTouchRecordStartAndEndRotation
Functions.Description: 获取Touch记录中保存的起始和终止旋转角

Params.Name: StartRotation
Params.Description: 起始旋转角，引用，在函数内赋值

Params.Name: EndRotation
Params.Description: 终止旋转角，引用，在函数内赋值
